productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Printed Camel Handbag
description: This is a super chic handbag from lino perros. The light camel colour will lift any outfit while the strap detailing on the front gives a sophisticated look. Made of printed synthetic leather for durability Has one main zippered compartment with striped lining One inner zippered pocket, one inner pocket and one mobile pocket Two short handles for carrying ease One zippered compartment at the back for additional space An extra pocket with press button on each side Stitched straps with metal rings on front with metallic embelishment of brand name Two long tassels to decorate front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
